articles.title: Report: Apple tops global smartphone market for first time in Q1 as overall shipments drop
articles.summary: Counterpoint Research has published its latest report on global smartphone shipments for Q1 2026, showing that strong demand for the iPhone 17 helped Apple take the top spot in the market for the first time in a first quarter. Here are the details. more…
articles.title_zh: 報告：Apple 在 Q1 首次登頂全球智慧型手機市場，整體出貨量下降
articles.summary_zh: Counterpoint Research 發布 Q1 2026 全球智慧型手機出貨量報告，顯示 iPhone 17 的強勁需求幫助 Apple 首次在第一季度佔據市場第一名。

articles.title: AI Mode in Google Search now helps you book restaurants in the UK
articles.summary: AI Mode in Google Search has received another new feature in the UK, following its initial rollout in the US last year. It can now book restaurants for you. You just need to describe what you're looking for, and list all of your needs and preferences. Google uses "find a table for two at a dog-friendly Italian restaurant in Shoreditch for Saturday at 7PM" as an example in the post announcing the new feature. There's also "find me a sushi restaurant nearby that has a table for four that also serves vegan tempura". You get the idea. AI Mode will show you a curated list of places to...
articles.title_zh: Google Search 中的 AI Mode 現已支援在英國預訂餐廳
articles.summary_zh: Google Search 的 AI Mode 在英國推出了新功能，可協助用戶預訂餐廳。用戶只需描述需求和偏好，Google 即可為您找到合適的餐廳。

articles.title: Motorola Edge 70 Pro and Razr 70 Ultra grab new certifications ahead of imminent unveiling
articles.summary: Yesterday was filled with a barrage of Motorola leaked renders, showing the Razr 70, Razr 70 Ultra, and the Edge 70 Pro. Today, the Edge 70 Pro and Razr 70 Ultra have been spotted in two separate certification databases. The Razr 70 Ultra with the model number XT2655-4 has been given the go-ahead in China by 3C. The certification reveals that it will have support for 68W wired charging. Incidentally, that's the same level as the Razr 60 Ultra, so there's no upgrade in this regard on the newer model. Meanwhile, the Edge 70 Pro with the model number XT2607-1 has bagged the TDRA...
articles.title_zh: Motorola Edge 70 Pro 和 Razr 70 Ultra 獲新認證，即將推出
articles.summary_zh: Motorola Edge 70 Pro 和 Razr 70 Ultra 已在認證資料庫中現身，Razr 70 Ultra（型號 XT2655-4）已獲得批准。

articles.title: How GNSS satellites power positioning and timing
articles.summary: From smartphones to cars to critical infrastructure, these early satellites power some of the most modern technologies of today GNSS is not a term that peppers media language often. Nevertheless, it underpins almost all technologies that we use in everyday…
articles.title_zh: GNSS 衛星如何驅動定位和授時
articles.summary_zh: 從智慧手機到汽車再到關鍵基礎設施，這些早期衛星為當今許多現代技術提供動力。GNSS 雖然不常見於媒體，但它支撐著我們日常使用的幾乎所有技術。

articles.title: Nvidia’s AI grid and the telco dilemma
articles.summary: Should telcos invest billions in edge GPU infrastructure or wait for physical AI use cases to mature? In sum – what we know: ABI Research recently put out an analysis looking at Nvidia’s AI grid concept and the bigger question…
articles.title_zh: Nvidia 的 AI 網格與電信運營商的困境
articles.summary_zh: 電信運營商應該投資數十億美元建設邊緣 GPU 基礎設施，還是等待 Physical AI 使用案例成熟？ABI Research 最近發布了一份分析，探討 Nvidia 的 AI 網格概念及其更廣泛的意義。

articles.title: Artemis II Returns From Historic Flight Around the Moon
articles.summary: After traveling a greater distance from Earth than any humans before them, the astronauts of Artemis II have safely returned home.
articles.title_zh: Artemis II 從歷史性的月球飛行中安全返回
articles.summary_zh: Artemis II的宇航員們在比之前任何人類都更遠離地球的地方旅行後，已經安全返回家園。

articles.title: Artemis II Safely Returns to Earth After Historic Moon Mission
articles.summary: NASA’s Artemis crew of four astronauts returned to Earth and splashed down in the Pacific Ocean, capping humanity’s first return to the moon in more than 50 years. (Source: Bloomberg)
articles.title_zh: Artemis II 在歷史性月球任務後安全返回地球
articles.summary_zh: NASA的Artemis四人機組在太平洋濺落，結束了人類50多年來首次重返月球的任務。

articles.title: Four astronauts are back home after a daring ride around the Moon
articles.summary: Slamming into the atmosphere at more than 30 times the speed of sound, NASA’s Orion spacecraft blazed a trail over the Pacific Ocean on Friday, returning home with four astronauts and safely capping humanity’s first voyage to the Moon in nearly 54 years. Temperatures outside the capsule builtup to some 5,000 degrees Fahrenheit as a sheath of plasma enveloped the Orion spacecraft, named Integrity , and its four long-distance travelers, temporarily blocking radio signals the Moon ship and Mission Control in Houston. Flying southwest to northeast, the spacecraft steered toward a splashdown zone southwest of San Diego, where a US Navy recovery ship held position to await the crew’s homecoming. Ground teams regained communications with Orion commander Reid Wiseman after a six-minute blackout. A
articles.title_zh: 四名宇航員在月球周圍的大膽飛行後返回家園
articles.summary_zh: NASA的Orion太空船以超音速30倍的速度衝入大氣層，在太平洋上空留下光芒軌跡，成功帶回四名宇航員，標誌著人類近54年來首次月球之旅的安全完成。

articles.title: Californians sue over AI tool that records doctor visits
articles.summary: Several Californians sued Sutter Health and MemorialCare this week over allegations that an AI transcription tool was used to record them without their consent, in violation of state and federal law. The proposed class-action lawsuit, filed on Wednesday in federal court in San Francisco, states that, within the past six months, the plaintiffs received medical care at various Sutter and MemorialCare facilities. During those visits, medical staff used Abridge AI. According to the complaint, this system “captured and processed their confidential physician-patient communications. Plaintiffs did not receive clear notice that their medical conversations would be recorded by an artificial intelligence platform, transmitted outside the clinical setting, or processed through third-party systems.” R
articles.title_zh: 加州人因錄製醫生會面的AI工具提起訴訟
articles.summary_zh: 數名加州居民本週對Sutter Health和MemorialCare提起訴訟，指控他們在未經同意的情況下使用AI轉錄工具進行錄製，違反了州和聯邦法律。

articles.title: App Store fight continues as Apple and Epic clash over court-ordered stay
articles.summary: Apple and Epic have filed new requests over whether the court should keep or lift a recent stay in their ongoing App Store legal battle. Here are the details. more…
articles.title_zh: App Store 爭訟持續 Apple 與 Epic 為法院命令的暫停令對簿公堂
articles.summary_zh: Apple 與 Epic 就是否應保持或解除其持續進行的 App Store 法律訴訟中的暫停令提交了新的請求。

articles.title: OpenAI says to update Mac apps including ChatGPT and Codex as security precaution
articles.summary: OpenAI is asking users of its Mac software to update to the latest releases from today “out of an abundance of caution.” This is due to a security issue with a third-party developer tool, Axios, that was used by OpenAI. more…
articles.title_zh: OpenAI 宣布更新 Mac 應用程式（包括 ChatGPT 和 Codex）以防範安全問題
articles.summary_zh: OpenAI 要求其 Mac 軟體使用者基於謹慎考量更新至最新版本，此舉係因為 OpenAI 使用的第三方開發工具存在安全問題。

articles.title: Apple Hires Uber’s Asia-Pacific Government Relations Chief
articles.summary: Apple Inc. has hired Uber Technologies Inc.’s head of public policy and government relations for Asia-Pacific as it looks to revamp its supply chains in the region.
articles.title_zh: Apple 聘請 Uber 亞太區政府關係主管
articles.summary_zh: Apple Inc. 聘請了 Uber Technologies Inc. 亞太區公共政策和政府關係負責人，以重組其在該地區的供應鏈。
